title: Official Launch Run
description: Guide a desert launch convoy across three lanes, swapping colors to clear official checkpoint gates before the countdown collapses.

howToPlayJson.title: Official Launch Run
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute launch route by switching lanes and matching your convoy color to incoming official gates while chaining perfect clears for a rising launch bonus.

controls.outcome: Moves the convoy to an adjacent lane.
Cycles the convoy between red, gold, and blue clearance colors.

controls.input: Press and hold during a countdown siren
controls.outcome: Locks your current color for 2 seconds, doubles gate value, and turns the next gate into an all-or-nothing launch check.

steps: Start in the center lane with a convoy carrying an official launch core.
Colored gates rush down three lanes; you must be in the matching lane and color when the convoy reaches a gate.
Each clean gate adds combo and slightly increases speed.
Every few seconds a short launch countdown begins, marked by ticking audio and flashing lane lights.
During that countdown, you can hold to arm launch mode: if your locked color matches the next gate, you get a boosted clear and bonus combo;
if it does not match, the run ends immediately.
Missing any normal gate, hitting a mismatched gate, or being in the wrong lane costs one hull segment; losing all hull segments ends the run
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score 10 points per normal gate, plus a combo multiplier that increases by 0.25 every 5 perfect clears up to x4. Launch mode gates are worth 2x points and add an extra combo step. Local leaderboard tracks highest single
tips: Swipe early for lane changes; tap late for color changes.
Use launch mode only when the next gate pattern is readable.
Build combo on easy stretches, then cash in during countdown windows.
Audio ticks warn that a launch gate is about to lock your choice.
